# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

Only the latest beta and release builds receive active security updates.

| Version | Supported          |
| ------- | ------------------ |
| 0.1.x   | :white_check_mark: |
| < 0.1   | :x:                |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

We take the security of `bc-desktop` and our users' data seriously. Because this application interacts with third-party APIs (Bandcamp, Last.fm, Discord), security reports are handled with high priority.

If you discover a vulnerability or security issue:

1. **Do not open a public GitHub issue.**
2. Please email the maintainer directly at **elric@bu.edu** with the subject line `[SECURITY] bc-desktop vulnerability report`.
3. Include a description of the vulnerability, steps to reproduce it, and any potential impact.

You can expect an initial acknowledgment within **48 to 72 hours**. If the issue is validated, a patch will be prepared and released as soon as possible, and you will be credited in the release notes (unless you prefer to remain anonymous).
